rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear reading from image.
Selected gemini-flash's description 'Soluta Varia.'. Visual verification confirms 'Soluta' over gpt-5-mini's 'Petita'. Both models noted the faintness and ambiguity of the first word.

rows.description: Deficiency in acct. in Domus Vinetes Packets in the half year to Mich. 1835 -
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description overridden based on visual verification. The words 'Vinetes Packets' were difficult to discern; 'Vinetes' appears visually more accurate than 'Vetiates' (gemini-flash) or 'Wines' (gpt-5-mini), and 'Packets' (gpt-5-mini) is more accurate than 'Patiates' (gemini-flash). Both models noted significant ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Shortfall in the household (Domus Vinetes) accounts for the half year ending Michaelmas 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Shortfall in the household (Domus Vinetes) accounts for the half year ending Michaelmas 1835, amounting to £2 18s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Throddle one year's Interest on his deposit of 130£....
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash. Visual verification clearly shows 'Throddle' and '130£' as opposed to gpt-5-mini's 'Shorrocks' and '130L.'.
rows.english_description: One year's interest paid to Mr. Throddle on his £130 deposit.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's interest paid to Mr. Throddle on his £130 deposit, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Phillips for the frame of the Picture in the Hall.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Its amounts (10 pounds) and description are clearly more accurate. gemini-flash's note specifically identifying the '1' in '10' as slightly offset but belonging to the pounds column demonstrated careful reading, while gpt-5-mini's note indicated significant illegibility ('???').
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr. Phillips for making the frame for the picture in the Hall.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr. Phillips for making the frame for the picture in the Hall, amounting to £10 3s 6d.

rows.description: For a Plan of the College Estates at Garrington
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Garrington' over gpt-5-mini's 'Garsington'. gpt-5-mini's note on spelling uncertainty was useful.
rows.english_description: Preparation of a plan (map) of the college estates at Garrington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Preparation of a plan (map) of the college estates at Garrington, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. King for the Timber on the Land taken in exchange at Bowerstock.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'King', 'Land', and 'Bowerstock' over gpt-5-mini's 'Parry', 'Pond', and 'Powerstock'. gpt-5-mini's note on uncertainty for the surname and place name was relevant.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr. King for timber from the land taken in exchange at Bowerstock.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr. King for timber from the land taken in exchange at Bowerstock, amounting to £127 17s 0d.

rows.description: To Dº. on acct. of Legal & other Expenses of the said exchange.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash, as it is more precise with the 'Dº.' abbreviation (including the superior 'o' and period) and the period after 'acct.', as seen in the image.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr. King on account of legal and other expenses relating to the land exchange.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr. King on account of legal and other expenses relating to the land exchange, amounting to £80 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Underwood Architects bills for 1835.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash, for accurately transcribing 'bills' (plural) and including the period at the end of the line.
rows.english_description: Architectural bills of Mr. Underwood for work in 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Architectural bills of Mr. Underwood for work in 1835, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Hetherwick, a Donation for Coals to the Poor of S. Wittenham at Xmas.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Hetherwick' over gpt-5-mini's 'Butterbuck', 'S.' with a period, and accurate punctuation throughout.
rows.english_description: Donation paid via Mr. Hetherwick for coals distributed to the poor of South Wittenham at Christmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Donation paid via Mr. Hetherwick for coals distributed to the poor of South Wittenham at Christmas, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: Subscription to the Church Organ at Siddington.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Siddington' over gpt-5-mini's 'Kidlington'/'Riddington'. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging ambiguity was helpful.
rows.english_description: Subscription contribution towards the church organ at Siddington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription contribution towards the church organ at Siddington, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Mr. Davis' Bill for Agency to Xmas 1835.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash for including the final period, which is visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Agency bill submitted by Mr. Davis to Christmas 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Agency bill submitted by Mr. Davis to Christmas 1835, amounting to £27 6s 0d.

rows.description: To the Heirs at Law of the late Mr. Williams Div. Book Page 220 & 348 - vid. Rec. Jan. 1834 -
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description overridden based on visual verification. Corrected 'Page 220' (gemini-flash had this correct) and 'vid. Rec. Jan. 1834' (synthesized from parts of both models, correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Inv.' and gemini-flash's 'Did.').
rows.english_description: Payment to the legal heirs of the late Mr. Williams as recorded (dividend/book references).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the legal heirs of the late Mr. Williams as recorded (dividend/book references), amounting to £12 18s 3d.

rows.description: To Mr. F.F. Cornish. Interest on 200£. 1/2 year to Lady Day 1836 -
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'F.F.' initials, the '£' symbol, and '1/2 year' for the interest period. gpt-5-mini had multiple inaccuracies in this description.
rows.english_description: Half‑year's interest paid to Mr. F. F. Cornish on £200 (to Lady Day 1836).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half‑year's interest paid to Mr. F. F. Cornish on £200 (to Lady Day 1836), amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Dayman. Subscription towards Building the School at Little Tew.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash for more precise punctuation (periods after 'Dayman' and at the end of the line).
rows.english_description: Subscription paid to Mr. Dayman towards building a school at Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription paid to Mr. Dayman towards building a school at Little Tew, amounting to £15 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Richards Subscription towards Building the Chapel at Bushey Heath.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash for more precise capitalization ('Subscription', 'Building') and punctuation.
rows.english_description: Subscription paid to Mr. Richards towards building the chapel at Bushey Heath.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription paid to Mr. Richards towards building the chapel at Bushey Heath, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Sewell. One qtr Int. on additional loan from the Library of 400£ to Mich. 1835.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description overridden based on visual verification. Corrected the surname to 'Sewell' (from gpt-5-mini), confirmed 'qtr' and '£' (from gemini-flash), and 'Mich.' with accurate punctuation from the image.
rows.english_description: Quarterly interest paid to Mr. Sewell on an additional £400 loan from the Library to Michaelmas 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Quarterly interest paid to Mr. Sewell on an additional £400 loan from the Library to Michaelmas 1835, amounting to £16 0s 0d.

rows.description: Commiseration to the Fellows for the Rent of Dry Piece & Watts. One qtr to Mich. 1835.
rows.notes: Amounts from consensus. Description overridden based on visual verification. Corrected 'Commiseration' (from gemini-flash) over gpt-5-mini's 'Contingency'. Verified 'Watts.' (with superior 's') and 'qtr' and 'Mich.' from the image. Both models noted ambiguity in this faded line.
rows.english_description: Distribution to the Fellows for the rent from the properties 'Dry Piece' and 'Watts' for the quarter to Michaelmas 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Distribution to the Fellows for the rent from the properties 'Dry Piece' and 'Watts' for the quarter to Michaelmas 1835, amounting to £23 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear numerical total from image. Horizontal line above indicates summation.
